title: Chaos Erupts from the Capital to Udon
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Zoro, Toko, Unknown person #10, Killer, Kid as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: The capital erupts after Yasuie’s death while Big Mom’s arrival throws Udon prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Keep it up, everyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: TAKE 'EM DOOOOON!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are they your allies, straw hat-man!? Is this not bad for-....!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: No!! Do it, ZORO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Slice up that scummy guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So those are the ones you came here with, straw hat? To aim for Orochi's head...

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Wahahaha, what an interesting bunch!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Master Queen, the CRIMIMALS our men caught in the flower capital have arrived!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Criminals!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Tell me who they are, old maid!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kamazou the manslayer is one of them. He failed to complete the mission Lord Orochi gave him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Orochi said you can decide what to do with him...

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.text: We've brought Kamazou the Manslayer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: whoaaa, it's kama- you!! He's the talk of the town!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: and Unex- Pectedly...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On our way back, we captured Captain Kid, the one who escaped from this prison!!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: gyahaha, that was fast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Escapees will be executed...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Spiley- Guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: kid......!! you're such a fool!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We heard him yelling at us from the distance, and then he rushed towards us...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we shot him a couple of times, and he didn't even bother resisting.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And that's why he's with us now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess he forgot about his seasons handcuffs!! haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He escaped earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So did he get caught on purpose or something....!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The next thing I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey... you've always hated that laugh of yours.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And then one day, you stopped laughing altogether.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAFAAFA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those who dared to laugh at you were left at the brink of death...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And then one day, you put on that mask to completely hide it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And now, after all that... what happened to you!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What did Kaido do to you after we separated!? or was it orochi?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And where's the rest of our crew!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Answer ME!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: FA FA!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Killer!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: gyahaha Haaaaa!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What could they have done to you for you to act like this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Who did this to my partner!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's... the mask guy from back then....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: did he try to save his comrade who fell victim to the smile?"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How pitiful....!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 51 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
